description: A CFD pre-processing engineer needs to deliver the eCRM-001 research wing-body model in three different formats for three downstream teams: (1) an STL triangulated surface mesh for a rapid prototyping team, (2) a Cart3D triangulated surface file (.tri) for the CFD team, and (3) a Degen Geom CSV export for the structures team's thin-shell analysis. Open the file /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 in OpenVSP and export the geometry in all three formats using exact filenames: /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_mesh.stl, /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_cart3d.tri, and /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_degengeom.csv. All exports must use OpenVSP's File > Export menu.
